title: RELIEF NURSERY - 211info
text: OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Relief nursery providing services for at-risk families that include therapeutic classrooms for toddlers and preschoolers, home visiting, outreach and parent support groups. Resource closet available with food, children's clothing, diapers, wipes, hygiene items and cleaning supplies. 1650 SW 45th Place Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-6 who are low-income, a single-parent, teen parent, experiencing mental health or drug/alcohol issues, victims of trauma or domestic violence, involvement with child welfare, homeless or at risk of becoming homeless Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (541) 757-8068 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 757-8068 Relief Nursery Program Manager Lindsay Myers [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Immunization records if child is in a classroom or child care LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off of SW Country Club Drive between 35th and 53rd Streets. Shares a driveway with Starker Arts and Sunset Parks. Services: Children's Clothing Children's Out of Home Respite Care Diapers Family Support Centers/Outreach * At Risk Families Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Parent Support Groups Personal/Grooming Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COURT MANDATED CO-PARENTING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - PEDIATRIC OCCUPATIONAL AND PHYSICAL THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES
